title: Lurkers Core
description: Adds medkit, Bandage and some tools with keys and decorations for fun
body:
**This mod was specifically created for the horror map “This is Lurker”, but you can use for your own purposes.**

**HALF OF ITEMS CAN TAKEN ONLY BY /give**

This mod adds the following items: axe, mask, keys, first aid kit and bandages

- The axe has a cooldown of 3 seconds and when hitting entities will give the effect of weakness and deceleration of level 6 for 3 seconds.
- Bandages regenerate ~5 health and medkit 2 times as much.
- Keys are useless and have no functionality.
- Mask has too many armor units for the reason that it is impossible to kill a maniac for the mode.
- Ventel is just decoration
- Door its too decoration
- machete just axe with 2 seconds cooldown
- Fan its too decoration
- Crowbar for break fans
- pliers to break chains

_So far there is nothing else_
